facts.description: Final selected objects after all eligibility filters, ranking rules, optional group limits, and top-N cutoff.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if exactly these selected objects are featured; IDs may be omitted but names must be identifiable.

facts.description: Selected objects must appear in rule-based ranking order after tie-breaks and any group-limit application.
facts.expected_value: Rain Garden Starter Kit before Mango Languages Family Pass before Ukulele Lending Set before Night Sky Telescope before Local History Scan Station
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept left-to-right, top-to-bottom, numbered, or hero-to-secondary order if it preserves the expected ranking.

facts.description: Each selected object must show the correct name and required display fields.
expected_value: Rain Garden Starter Kit, category: Maker & Creativity, branch: North Branch, available units: 72
Mango Languages Family Pass, category: Digital Access, branch: East Branch, available units: 120
Ukulele Lending Set, category: Music Lending, branch: North Branch, available units: 32
Night Sky Telescope, category: STEM Discovery, branch: West Branch, available units: 18
Local History Scan Station, category: Local History, branch: East Branch, available units: 46
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept equivalent formatting when display values are attached to the correct selected names.

facts.description: The final selection obeys the at-most-1-per-category_label group limit after sorting.
facts.expected_value: Digital Access: 1, Local History: 1, Maker & Creativity: 1, Music Lending: 1, STEM Discovery: 1
facts.canonical_answer: Selected group counts are Digital Access: 1, Local History: 1, Maker & Creativity: 1, Music Lending: 1, STEM Discovery: 1; no category_label exceeds 1.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if the image does not add extra featured objects that would violate the group cap.

facts.description: Mapped display labels from support sheets or join tables must be shown instead of raw codes and attached to the correct selected objects.
expected_value: Rain Garden Starter Kit: category_code MAKER -> Maker & Creativity
Rain Garden Starter Kit: branch_code NORTH -> North Branch
Mango Languages Family Pass: category_code DIGITAL -> Digital Access
Mango Languages Family Pass: branch_code EAST -> East Branch
Ukulele Lending Set: category_code MUSIC -> Music Lending
Ukulele Lending Set: branch_code NORTH -> North Branch
Night Sky Telescope: category_code STEM -> STEM Discovery
Night Sky Telescope: branch_code WEST -> West Branch
Local History Scan Station: category_code ARCHIVE -> Local History
Local History Scan Station: branch_code EAST -> East Branch
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if mapped labels, not raw codes, are visibly bound to the correct selected names.

facts.description: Filtered-out, group-cap-blocked where applicable, and below-cutoff eligible candidates must not appear as final featured selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Only the selected_objects list should be featured as final selections.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The image may mention exclusion context, but must not promote any unselected object as selected.
allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|ineligible|below cutoff|blocked)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Archived\ Vinyl\ Sampler|Staff\ Training\ VR\ Kit|Uncleared\ Film\ Pass|Summer\ Old\ Reading\ Bag|Low\ Stock\ Craft\ Box|Fragile\ Print\ Portfolio|Draft\ Coding\ Robot|Cancelled\ Museum\ Pass|Internal\ Genealogy\ Tablet|Test\ Media\ Editing\ Laptop|Training\ Storytime\ Puppet\ Kit|Private\ Donor\ Room\ Pass|Old\ Winter\ Reading\ Badge|Retired\ Vinyl\ Listening\ Dock|Demo\ Family\ Tablet\ Stand|Inactive\ Coding\ Club\ Bot|Private\ Local\ Map\ Portfolio|Seed\ Library\ Bundle|Board\ Game\ Discovery\ Crate|Mobile\ Hotspot\ Pack)\b

\b(Archived\ Vinyl\ Sampler|Staff\ Training\ VR\ Kit|Uncleared\ Film\ Pass|Summer\ Old\ Reading\ Bag|Low\ Stock\ Craft\ Box|Fragile\ Print\ Portfolio|Draft\ Coding\ Robot|Cancelled\ Museum\ Pass|Internal\ Genealogy\ Tablet|Test\ Media\ Editing\ Laptop|Training\ Storytime\ Puppet\ Kit|Private\ Donor\ Room\ Pass|Old\ Winter\ Reading\ Badge|Retired\ Vinyl\ Listening\ Dock|Demo\ Family\ Tablet\ Stand|Inactive\ Coding\ Club\ Bot|Private\ Local\ Map\ Portfolio|Seed\ Library\ Bundle|Board\ Game\ Discovery\ Crate|Mobile\ Hotspot\ Pack)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|ineligible|below cutoff|blocked)\b

facts.description: Candidates failing status, window, eligibility, threshold, readiness, rights, or setup rules are not final selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Rows failing eligibility filters are excluded before ranking.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No eligibility-failed candidate should be promoted as selected.

facts.description: Eligible candidates blocked by the category_label group limit are not final selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Eligible rows that exceed the category_label cap are excluded after ranking.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No group-cap-blocked candidate should be promoted as selected.

facts.description: Eligible candidates below the final top-N cutoff are not final selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Eligible but lower-ranked rows remain unfeatured because they fall below the selected top-N after group limits.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Below-cutoff candidates should not be promoted as final selections.

calculation_notes: Independent calculation: read library_resources.xlsx and spotlight_rules.json. Apply mappings [{'table': 'category_mapping', 'source_field': 'category_code', 'code_field': 'category_code', 'label_field': 'category_label', 'target_field': 'category_label'}, {'table': 'branch_mapping', 'source_field': 'branch_code', 'code_field': 'branch_code', 'label_field': 'branch_name', 'target_field': 'branch_name'}] from support tables/sheets before evaluating rules and display values. Filter rows with equals={'status': 'READY', 'campaign_window': 'library_week_2027'}, in={}, gt={}, gte={'community_priority': 84, 'available_units': 10}, lte={'handling_level': 5}, bool_true={'public_ready': True, 'rights_ok': True}. Sort eligible rows by [{'field': 'community_priority', 'direction': 'desc'}, {'field': 'available_units', 'direction': 'desc'}, {'field': 'handling_level', 'direction': 'asc'}, {'field': 'name', 'direction': 'asc'}]. No-cap top 5 IDs would be R901, R902, R903, R904, R905. Apply group cap category_label<=1 while scanning the ranked list, then select top 5. Eligible ranked order is R901, R902, R903, R904, R905, R906, R907, R908, R915, R916, R919, R920. Selected IDs are R901, R902, R903, R905, R906. Group-cap blocked IDs are R904. Eligible below-cutoff IDs are R907, R908, R915, R916, R919, R920. Exclude eligibility-failed IDs R909, R910, R911, R912, R913, R914, R917, R918, R921, R922, R923, R924, R925, R926, R927, R928, R929; also exclude group-cap-blocked and below-cutoff eligible rows from final featured selections.
